patch.value:
The pm-vvib cognitive ADR maps seven memory subsystems onto pm primitives, but omits the one mechanism that makes biological memory adaptive: retrieval strengthens the trace. Every signal in pm-4k6b's current design (recency, graph proximity, priority, semantics, knowledge density, author affinity) describes the workspace; none observes whether the context the engine served was actually useful. Without outcome feedback the scorer can be tuned once (pm-atfm golden judgments) but never learns from live use.

Proposal: when pm context/next serve a working set, record a minimal serving event; when the same author subsequently gets/claims/updates/closes a served item within a horizon, that pairing becomes an implicit positive judgment. Aggregated (and decayed) per item and per (author, item), it becomes: (1) a usage-affinity input to the pm-4k6b scorer — items this agent historically acted on after being shown rank higher for this agent; (2) free implicit-judgment data for the pm-atfm harness, complementing hand-graded goldens; (3) at pm-5qmm consolidation time, a salience hint for what an epoch rollup should keep verbatim vs summarize away.

Cognitive framing (extends pm-vvib, to be added to the ADR's subsystem map if accepted): retrieval-practice / Hebbian strengthening — recall is not read-only; it reshapes future recall. Graceful-forgetting decay already in the ADR is the complementary weakening term.

Sequencing: phase 2+ of the context engine — needs pm-3hps (feature store) and the pm-h3no scorer contract landed first; the ledger design should ride the same derived-store mechanics as pm-3hps. Priority 3 until pm-4k6b core ships a deterministic baseline (determinism note: usage signal is itself deterministic for a fixed ledger state, preserving pm-4k6b's reproducibility AC).

Duplicate-check evidence: pm search 'context usage feedback signal reinforcement' -> only pm-4k6b (scorer, no outcome loop) and unrelated closed items; pm-vvib body confirms no strengthening-through-recall subsystem exists in the recorded architecture.
Context usage feedback signal: served-then-acted-on outcomes strengthen relevance scoring (retrieval-practice effect)

Close the loop between context assembly and what agents actually did with it: derive a bounded usage signal (items served by context/next that the same author subsequently read, claimed, mutated, or closed) and feed it back into the pm-4k6b scorer as a strengthening/calibration input, mirroring how human recall strengthens memory traces.

A derived, append-only usage ledger records (serving, author, served ids, subsequent touch within a horizon) with bounded size and a documented retention/compaction policy; the ledger is derived data — never mutates tracked items and is excluded from item history-chain integrity; pm-4k6b scorer accepts a usage-affinity signal with a documented default weight and per-signal explanation in the score breakdown; signal is workspace-local, contains no content beyond item ids/timestamps/author, and can be disabled via config with zero residual cost; pm-atfm harness gains implicit-judgment scenarios (served-and-used vs served-and-ignored) to validate the signal improves ranking rather than entrenching it; popularity-bias guard: a documented exploration/decay term prevents self-reinforcing lock-in of already-surfaced items; no daemon (ADR pm-i7i4) — capture happens inline on the commands that already run

value.author: maintainer-agent
value.text: Scope addition 2026-07-12: pm-4k6b algorithm (19) task-set profiles graduate here (wave 4) — partition the "agent used item next" labels by triggering intent (verb of the following mutation in the episodic stream, pure derivation) and fit per-(workspace x intent) weight vectors; fallback hierarchy profile -> global weights -> RRF stays strict. Definition on the pm-4k6b ledger note (19), packer-side table on pm-55ra.

value.author: maintainer-agent
value.text: Scope note from pm-4k6b directed pass 2026-07-13: (a) this item additionally owns the per-workspace graduation of algorithm (21)'s shrinkage pseudo-counts k (same label machinery as the (3)/(19) weight graduation). (b) Hard prerequisite recorded here because it must ship WITH the feedback loop: context/next envelopes must LOG the disclosed profile, per-item rank, and inclusion decision (propensity logging) so any future online/off-policy weight learning stays possible — an online contextual-bandit learner was considered on pm-4k6b 2026-07-13 and REJECTED as a separate algorithm precisely because it is this item's graduation territory; without propensity logs that door closes silently.
